name: Quick Fix Pasta Sauces
recipeIngredient: Bacon slices, cut into 1 inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. For Alfredo Pasta: Bring whipping cream and butter to a simmer in a saucepan over medium heat. Pour the mixture into a bowl and toss with fettuccini, Parmesan cheese, salt, and cayenne pepper.
2. For Fresh Tomato Pasta: Seed and chop tomatoes, then add olive oil, dried basil, dried oregano, cooked spaghetti, grated Parmesan, and black pepper. Toss to combine.
3. For Italian Sausage Pasta: Cut sausages into bite-sized pieces and brown in a skillet with 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add canned tomatoes and dried basil, breaking the tomatoes into pieces as they cook. Cook until thick, then toss with cooked pasta.
4. For Bacon and Tomato Pasta: Cut bacon slices into 1-inch pieces and cook until crisp in a skillet. Add olive oil, chopped tomatoes, chopped green onions, garlic cloves, dried basil, salt, and pepper to the skillet. Toss with cooked pasta.
5. For Sour Cream Pasta: Cook sour cream and drained tuna (or salmon) over low heat. Add sliced green onions and toss with 4 cups of cooked noodles.
